  • Overview

  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    Consumption
    Represents consumption data in the Tibber API.
    ConsumptionQuery
    Query for retrieving consumption data from the Tibber API.
    Home
    Represents a home in the Tibber API.
    Home.Address
    Represents an address in the Tibber API.
    Home.Features
    Represents features available for a home in the Tibber API.
    Home.MeteringPointData
    Represents metering point data in the Tibber API.
    Home.PriceInfo
    Represents price information in the Tibber API.
    Home.Subscription
    Represents a subscription in the Tibber API.
    LiveMeasurement
    Represents real-time measurement data from the Tibber API.
    LiveMeasurementSubscription
    Subscription for receiving real-time measurement data from the Tibber API.
    Price
    Represents electricity price information in the Tibber API.
    PriceQuery
    Query for retrieving price information from the Tibber API.
    Production
    Represents production data in the Tibber API.
    ProductionQuery
    Query for retrieving production data from the Tibber API.
    SubscriptionHandler
    Interface for handling subscription events from the Tibber API.
    TibberApiClient
    Client for interacting with the Tibber GraphQL API.
    User
    Represents a Tibber user.
    UserQuery
    Query for retrieving user information from the Tibber API.
